message:
refactor(cli): add tokenizeAndParse and outputResults helpers for DRY

Consolidated 8 run*Query functions from ~38 lines each to ~15 lines each.
Extracted common tokenize/parse code into tokenizeAndParse().
Extracted common output code into outputResults().
Reduced cli.zig from 1018 to 869 lines (-149 lines, 15% reduction).
